fields.label: Store Name
fields.description: A friendly label for this store, e.g. 'Main Store'. Used in sync logs and reports.

fields.label: WooCommerce URL
fields.description: Full WooCommerce store URL including https://, e.g. https://mystore.com. Do not include /wp-admin.

fields.label: Is Active
fields.description: Uncheck to pause all sync for this store without deleting its configuration.

fields.label: Connection Status
fields.description: Last known connection status. Updated automatically when you test the connection.

fields.label: Last Connection Check
fields.description: When ERPNext last successfully communicated with this WooCommerce store.

fields.label: Consumer Key
fields.description: WooCommerce REST API Consumer Key. Generate in WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > REST API. Set permission to Read/Write.

fields.label: Consumer Secret
fields.description: WooCommerce REST API Consumer Secret. Generated alongside Consumer Key. Stored encrypted in ERPNext.

fields.label: Webhook Secret
fields.description: Secret used to verify incoming WooCommerce webhook signatures (HMAC-SHA256). Auto-generated on save. Copy this into your WooCommerce webhook settings.

fields.label: WooCommerce API Version
fields.description: WooCommerce REST API version. Leave as wc/v3 unless instructed otherwise by support.

fields.label: Company
fields.description: WooCommerce orders are created under this company in ERPNext. Required.

fields.label: Warehouse
fields.description: Stock levels pushed to WooCommerce come from this warehouse. Delivery orders for WooCommerce sales also use this warehouse.

fields.label: Income Account
fields.description: Which account records WooCommerce sales revenue. Usually your main Sales account in your chart of accounts.

fields.label: Tax Account
fields.description: Which account records taxes collected from WooCommerce. Usually 'Sales Tax Payable' or 'Output VAT'.

fields.label: Item Group
fields.description: New products imported from WooCommerce are placed in this item group. You can move them to other groups later.

fields.label: Customer Group
fields.description: WooCommerce customers are assigned to this customer group in ERPNext. Useful for segmenting ecommerce vs direct sales.

fields.label: Default UOM
fields.description: Unit of measure for imported products. Usually 'Nos' (Numbers). Individual items can use different UOMs later.

fields.label: SO Naming Series
fields.description: Naming series for Sales Orders created from WooCommerce orders. Helps identify WooCommerce orders in ERPNext reports.

fields.label: Sync Direction
fields.options:
Both Ways
WooCommerce to ERPNext
ERPNext to WooCommerce
fields.description: Both Ways: keeps everything in sync. WooCommerce to ERPNext: WooCommerce is master. ERPNext to WooCommerce: ERPNext is master.

fields.label: API Rate Limit (per minute)
fields.description: Maximum WooCommerce API requests per minute. 60 is safe for most stores. Raise to 120 on dedicated servers.

fields.label: Item Matching Field
fields.description: How to match WooCommerce products to existing ERPNext items. SKU is most reliable — it is unique per product. Item Name can fail if names differ slightly.

fields.label: Create Items from WooCommerce
fields.description: Automatically create new ERPNext items when WooCommerce products are received. Disable if you manage your item master only in ERPNext and do not want automatic creation.

fields.label: Update Items from WooCommerce
fields.description: Overwrite ERPNext item fields (name, description, price) when WooCommerce sends an update. Disable if ERPNext is your product master and WooCommerce should follow it.

fields.label: Item Price List
fields.description: Which ERPNext price list receives WooCommerce product prices. Usually 'Standard Selling'.

fields.label: Last Sync Time
fields.description: When this store last completed a poll for WooCommerce changes. Updated automatically by the scheduler.

fields.label: Create Sales Orders from WooCommerce
fields.description: Automatically create ERPNext Sales Orders when WooCommerce orders arrive. Disable to handle orders manually.

fields.label: Auto-Submit Sales Orders
fields.description: Automatically submit Sales Orders after creation. Leave unchecked to review orders before submission.

fields.label: Shipping Item Code
fields.description: ERPNext item code used for WooCommerce shipping charges. Created automatically if it doesn't exist.

fields.label: Sync Customers from WooCommerce
fields.description: Automatically create ERPNext Customers when WooCommerce customer webhooks arrive.

fields.label: Update Customers from WooCommerce
fields.description: Overwrite ERPNext Customer data when WooCommerce sends updates. Disable if ERPNext is your customer master.

fields.label: Default Territory
fields.description: Default territory for WooCommerce customers. Defaults to 'All Territories' if not set.

fields.label: Sync Stock to WooCommerce
fields.description: Push stock level changes from ERPNext to WooCommerce when a Stock Ledger Entry is submitted.

fields.label: Sync Stock from WooCommerce
fields.description: Create Stock Reconciliation in ERPNext when WooCommerce stock changes. Use with caution — may conflict if both systems manage stock.

fields.label: Stock Sync Threshold
fields.description: Only push stock updates when quantity differs by more than this amount. Set to 0 to always sync. Useful for high-volume stores.

fields.label: Accounting Settings
fields.description: Configure automatic Sales Invoice and Payment Entry creation from WooCommerce orders.

fields.label: Auto Create Sales Invoice
fields.description: Automatically create a Sales Invoice when a WooCommerce order is marked as completed or processing.

fields.label: Auto Submit Sales Invoice
fields.description: Automatically submit Sales Invoices. Enable only after testing — submitted invoices cannot be edited.

fields.label: Auto Create Payment Entry
fields.description: Automatically create a Payment Entry for paid WooCommerce orders (non-COD).

fields.label: Auto Submit Payment Entry
fields.description: Automatically submit Payment Entries. Enable only after testing.

fields.label: Receivable Account
fields.description: Accounts receivable account for WooCommerce sales. Defaults to company's default receivable account if not set.

fields.label: Payment Account
fields.description: Bank or cash account where WooCommerce payments are received. Used in Payment Entry.

fields.label: Invoice Naming Series
fields.description: Naming series for Sales Invoices created from WooCommerce orders.

fields.label: Push Prices Trigger
fields.description: When to push ERPNext price changes to WooCommerce. 'On Save' pushes immediately when an Item Price is saved. 'Scheduled' batches changes every 15 minutes. 'Manual' requires clicking Sync Prices.

fields.label: Update Prices from WooCommerce
fields.description: Update ERPNext Item Prices when WooCommerce product prices change. Disable if ERPNext is your price master.

fields.label: Sale Price List
fields.description: Price list used for WooCommerce sale prices. If set, sale_price from WooCommerce is synced to this price list.

fields.label: Currency Rounding
fields.options:
No Rounding
2 Decimal Places
Nearest Integer
fields.description: How to round prices when syncing between ERPNext and WooCommerce.

fields.label: Installed Webhooks
fields.description: Webhooks registered in WooCommerce for this store. Populated automatically when you click Install Webhooks.

fields.label: Webhook URL
fields.description: Register this URL in WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > Webhooks. ERPNext automatically fills this based on your site URL.
